    Constructor
    Description
     
    Coin(Position position, int value)
    Constructs a Coin object at a specified position with a given value.

    Constructs an EscapeGate object at a specified position.

    Constructs a Food object at a specified position.
     
    Player(Position startPos, int maxHealth, GamePanel gp)
    Constructs a Player object with a specified starting position and maximum health.
     
    Player(Position startPos, GamePanel gp)
    Constructs a Player object with a default maximum health of 6.
     
    StillEntity(Position position)
    Constructs a StillEntity at the specified position.
     
    Trap(Position position, int damage)
    Constructs a Trap object at a specified position with a defined damage value.

    Constructs a Zombie object.
